transcript.text: Hello, Bhavesh ji! Main Priya bol rahi hoon, Imagicaa Theme Park se. Aapne recently 12 April 2026 ke liye tickets cart mein add kiye the — 2 Adult, 2 Child ke liye. Booking complete nahi hui thi, toh socha aapko ek baar remind kar doon. Koi problem thi kya?
Haan, Bhavesh ji, total ₹4796 ka amount ho raha tha. Kya budget ka issue tha? Main aapko discount de sakti hoon usmein.
दे दो ना, कुछ डिस्काउंट हो सके तो?
Haan, bilkul! Main aapko 10% ka discount
Maine aapko discount ke saath link bhej diya hai SMS
Maine aapko discount ke saath link bhej diya hai SMS pe. Aap
Theek hai, maine link bhej diya hai. Aap check kar lena. Aur koi
Theek hai, koi baat nahi. Agar aapka plan change ho toh, baad mein book kar lijiyega. Have a good day!
